# Soft17 Async5 Tool1k Contract

## Soft 17
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.17 with quality bias floor 0.15 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 5
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.05 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 1k
tool result budgets default to 1000 chars with 18-char previews; Grep head defaults to 80 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status vitest
